productName: Thunder Stix Infused Preroll (1.2g) / Double Tap
description: A indica pre-roll of Double Tap supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of diesel, berry, and pungent, delivering a heavy, relaxed body calm. Pace yourself.
